search_document:
User Request: Customer statistics.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Monthly revenue trend
Title: Customer Distribution by Region
Type: chart
Description: Number of customers segmented by region
Title: Total Customers
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of customers
Title: Customer Types
Type: pie_chart
Description: Distribution of customers by type
Title: Average Order Value
Type: kpi
Description: Average value of customer orders

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Customer Distribution by Region
sql_queries.description: Number of customers segmented by region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Region, COUNT(CustomerID) AS CustomerCount FROM Customers GROUP BY Region

sql_queries.title: Total Customers
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(CustomerID) AS TotalCustomers FROM Customers

sql_queries.title: Customer Types
sql_queries.sql: SELECT cd.CustomerDesc, COUNT(ccd.CustomerID) AS CustomerCount FROM CustomerDemographics cd JOIN CustomerCustomerDemo ccd ON cd.CustomerTypeID = ccd.CustomerTypeID GROUP BY cd.CustomerDesc

sql_queries.title: Average Order Value
sql_queries.sql: SELECT AVG(TotalOrderValue) AS AverageOrderValue FROM (SELECT o.OrderID, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalOrderValue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY o.OrderID)
